title: Signal (delayed demo standard)
_note: DRAFT v2 (#Signal). Full signal standard, posted to free as delayed demo. SL is a mandatory field. Market-dependent: fill every [..] (Signal ID, COIN, levels, SL, sizing) on publish day, then set ready=true. Never invent numbers. CTA via [bot link] — resolved by editor to the real VIP bot URL before publish.
body:
🔺 #Signal  ·  SIGNAL ID: LC-[####]

[COIN]/USDT  |  LONG
Leverage: [50–100]x
Entry zone: [entry low] – [entry high]
TP1: [tp1]   TP2: [tp2]   TP3: [tp3]
SL: [sl]   ← hard stop, set BEFORE entry

📏 Sizing: risk ≤ [X]% of account on this one. The leverage is aggressive — the size is not. That's the whole game.
🧭 Basis: [≥2 confirming sources / data — e.g. funding + liq-heatmap + level confluence]. SL placed away from the liquidation magnet on purpose.

🕒 Demo signal — this went to VIP [N]h ago and is posted here as an example. Live signals drop in VIP in real time 👉 [bot link]

#Signal
